## ContentTree.findBy() method

Search a typed record field, using an index when configured.

**Signature:**

```typescript
findBy<TKey extends keyof TFrontmatter>(key: TKey, value: ContentFieldValue<TFrontmatter, TKey>, options?: FindOptions<TFrontmatter>): readonly ContentNode<TFrontmatter>[];
```
